top_desires: Early access to limited drops and exclusives
top_frustrations: Price point is steep compared to alternatives
Limited edition drops sell out instantly to resellers
App can be buggy and slow during high-traffic releases
Environmental claims feel performative to some customers
emotional_drivers: Belonging to an active lifestyle tribe
Nostalgia for classic models and brand heritage
objections: Too expensive compared to Adidas, Puma, or New Balance alternatives
Unsure if tech features (Air Zoom, React, etc.) are actually worth the premium
Concerns about labor practices in overseas manufacturing
Over-saturation — everyone wears Nike, lacks exclusivity
Sustainability messaging conflicts with constant new releases
